studies.title:
Use of a training-based smartphone application (Orthopy App) for patients with
rotator cuff-related disorders in comparison to usual care – a randomized,
controlled, multicenter study

_verification.reason: The study mentions 'Orthopy App,' but it is focused on rotator cuff-related disorders, not knee injuries. The product 'Orthopy bei Knieverletzungen' is specifically for knee-related conditions, and there is no explicit mention of this product or its specific application in the study.
